        exact hx ▸ hN_in_B
    exact hBN h_singleton
  · have h_disj : Disjoint N N' := D.sSupIndep.pairwise_disjoint hN hN' hNN'
    have hN_le_N' : N ≤ N' := by rw [hB N' hN']; exact le_sSup hN_in_B
    have hN_bot : N = ⊥ := Disjoint.eq_bot_of_le h_disj hN_le_N'
    exact D.not_bot_mem (hN_bot ▸ hN)
